cms.task_text: Naprogramujte želvu, aby nakreslila [hlp]rovnou čáru[/hlp]. Prvních 40 pixelů nakreslete [hlp]s tloušťkou 1[/hlp] (tenká), pak [hlp]změňte tloušťku na 8[/hlp] a nakreslete dalších 40 pixelů (tlustá). Vznikne jedna rovná čára, která se [hlp]mění z tenké na tlustou[/hlp].
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">2</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><field name="WIDTH">8</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_width" x="50" y="50"><field name="WIDTH">1</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><field name="WIDTH">8</field><next><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">40</field></block></next></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
